name: GraphicObject.GraphicObjectAttributes
summary: The GraphicObjectAttributes class is the attributes class of the graphic object.

constructors.name: GraphicObject.GraphicObjectAttributes()
constructors.summary: Creates a new graphic object attributes instance.

constructors.name: GraphicObject.GraphicObjectAttributes(String)
constructors.summary: Creates a new graphic object attributes instance using the given attribute file's filename.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file.

methods.name: IsEqual
methods.summary: Compares the current object with an object of the same type.

params.name: ObjectToCompare
params.doc: The object to be used for comparing.

returns.doc: True if all the fields (except for the database GUID) of the objects match.

methods.name: LoadAttributes
methods.summary: Loads the attributes from the specified file.

params.name: AttributeFile
params.doc: The filename of the attribute file. Use only the filename, not the extension.

returns.doc: True if the attributes are loaded correctly. False if the attribute file loading failed.

properties.name: Line
properties.summary: The line attributes of the graphic object. A graphic object always consists of lines.
